sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Block Creation/Destruction
special_mechanics.description: Dana can create or destroy orange blocks adjacent to him. Blocks can be destroyed by hitting them with the character's head twice.

special_mechanics.name: Fireball Attack
special_mechanics.description: Dana can cast fireballs to destroy demons and clear obstacles

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. No precise physics parameters documented in Data Crystal, TCRF, or Wikipedia sources. Game is primarily documented for gameplay mechanics, level design, and development history rather than technical movement physics.
sources_used: data_crystal - ROM map and basic technical specifications
tcrf - Game overview and unused content
wikipedia - Gameplay mechanics and development history
